title: Revive
description: Revive your friends when they have died
body:
[![ServerAtelier](https://www.serveratelier.com/assets/themes/atelier/assets/images/banner/sa_budget.png)](https://www.serveratelier.com/) ![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/eXQxKIM.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/Revive/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/Revive/issues)


Revive adds two potions to revive players. A good version of the potion is brewed by adding a revival star, which can be traded from a cleric villager, into regeneration lvl2 potions. The bad version of the potion can be brewed with mundane potions and a golden apple. It works in hardcore mode too! Check out the config settings if you want to customize anything. ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/zotECfH.png) ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/OqMvwgt.png)

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
